overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown street in Night City. The player moves along wet reflective pavement past towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements, crosses under an elevated highway, and approaches a food stall before entering a darker corridor. The scene features heavy cyberpunk aesthetic with purple, pink, and blue neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, approaching a large vertical billboard in the distance

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with motion blur speeding past on the wet road

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying a woman with purple hair and 'Cyberpunk' text
building covered in multiple glowing advertisement screens and neon strips
tall palm tree trunk visible beside the road barrier
yellow and black striped concrete divider separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked downtown sidewalk at night, surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture. The player walks forward toward a massive vertical billboard while futuristic vehicles blur past on the left. The right side features a building facade covered in glowing neon advertisements, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant purple and blue lights.

events.description: approaching and entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass
crossing the multi-lane street via the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through pedestrians while crossing the wide intersection under the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in white pants and dark jacket walking ahead into the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive elevated highway with yellow and black striped supports spanning the road
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass. The environment transitions from open sky to semi-covered as the camera moves under the concrete structure. Pedestrians scatter across the wide crosswalk while the player navigates through them, and the lighting shifts to a mix of neon signs and harsh artificial lights from the overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with food vendors under highway overpass

events.description: passing by a brightly lit pink neon food stall with customers gathered

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza area, passing pedestrians and approaching a food stall

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket standing near the food stall counter

entered.detail: circular food kiosk glowing with bright pink and purple neon lights, serving customers
underside of the highway structure with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass, the scene opens into a covered plaza illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights and vibrant neon. A distinctive circular food stall bathed in pink light sits on the left, drawing pedestrians. The environment feels more enclosed and urban, with concrete pillars supporting the highway above and various digital advertisements visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor leading to embers bar

events.description: entering a darker corridor with significantly reduced ambient light
passing the embers bar entrance with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking into a darker, narrower corridor with walls closing in on both sides

entered.detail: red neon sign reading 'EMBERS' above a bar entrance with blue neon accents
tall concrete walls with visible cracks creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dark, narrow service corridor with dramatically reduced lighting. The player passes the entrance to 'Embers' bar, marked by red neon signage, before continuing into a shadowy tunnel. The environment shifts from the vibrant, open plaza to a confined, moody passage with cracked concrete walls and only distant neon glows providing illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-slicked downtown district that transitions from an open, neon-lit street into the sheltered shadow of a massive highway overpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture, moving forward toward a massive vertical billboard as futuristic vehicles blur past. As the camera advances, the vibrant purple and blue reflections on the pavement intensify, guided by glowing advertisements lining the building facades. The scene then shifts as the player approaches a major intersection, moving from the open night sky into the semi-covered expanse beneath a concrete overpass. Finally, the environment becomes more crowded as the camera navigates through pedestrians in a crosswalk, where the lighting blends neon signs with the harsh artificial glow of the structure above.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit urban plaza into a dark and claustrophobic service corridor. It begins by moving deeper under a highway overpass, opening into a covered plaza where overhead fluorescent lights and a pink-bathed circular food stall illuminate the concrete surroundings. As the camera advances past the bustling pedestrians and digital advertisements, the open space begins to contract. The scene then shifts abruptly into a narrow passage, passing the red neon signage of Embers bar before the lighting drops dramatically. Finally, the environment transforms into a shadowy tunnel characterized by cracked concrete walls and only the faint, distant glow of neon.
